name: tdd
description: Test-Driven Development: tests before code, RED→GREEN→REFACTOR, naming convention.

rules.guidance: New behavior requires a failing test first. Do not write implementation code before at least one test exists and fails for the right reason.
Follow the RED→GREEN→REFACTOR cycle. Refactor only after the test suite is green. Do not optimize prematurely or add abstractions during the RED phase.
Name tests test_<what>_<condition>_<result> (or equivalent for the stack). Test name must be a specification statement readable without the implementation.
Do not commit .skip/.only/xtest markers. Skipped tests are technical debt that hides regressions. If a test is flaky, fix or delete it — do not skip indefinitely.
